title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Tama, Zoro, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So you've picked up your three swords?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I was told not to say "Sunacchi."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just something I heard from an old geezer in my village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've never used the word myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That geezer always sat by the shore. I never bothered learning his name.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I only found out he was Kuna's grandfather after he groaked.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shimotsuki Kozaburo, left this country illegally over 50 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a battle cry that gives you courage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is it true you were a Samural?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Everyone at the Dojo says you were.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're gonna bring the Marines down on my head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of your business! Now Scram, you shot-nosed brat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Screw you, you useless old windbag!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fed up with practicing at the dojo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WHA-?! but I don't have any money!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fine, take 'em, they're not much anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can only make ones like these now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Listen! Swords exist to cut people down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When Smiths create them, they ensure they can take as many lives possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each blade is like a person with a unique disposition...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A swordsman is one who tames the sword's wild nature and bends it to their will!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
